message:
docs: improve documentation for trace event and diff utilities

Enhanced documentation across trace and utility modules:

trace/canonicalize.rs:
- Expanded TraceEventKey::new() doc comment to explain its purpose
  in canonical ordering and fixture generation workflows

trace/format.rs:
- Minor wording improvement in GoldenTraceDiff::is_empty() doc
  ("when" → "if" for consistency with Rust stdlib conventions)

These documentation improvements help developers understand the
role of these utilities in the trace verification system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
